creator: albert.shih@obspm.fr
text:
So yes after installing rubygem-net-ftp solve the problem. 

I've try every rubygem in the porttree where the «archive» string appear but no idea to check the log of ruby upgrade :-( :-( my bad.

Thanks a lot.

No problem for me for upgrading other freebsd node. I just add in my freebsd profile to install rubygem-net-ftp now....after the client run (still under ruby-3.0 apart for one server) I will upgrade puppet and ruby ;-)

Again thanks a lot for the help and maintaining those ports. 


I think maybe just add a dependency in the puppet7 ports would be nice...I'm guessing, not 100% sure. I let this bug report open for that, but of course you can close it.
